paper_title: LITMUS∞: SMT-Verified Memory Model Portability Checking for Cross-Architecture Concurrent Code

paper_claims.claim: 75 litmus tests × 10 architectures = 750 test-model pairs
paper_claims.evidence: litmus_inf/paper_results_v4/portability_matrix.json (750 entries)
paper_claims.reproducible_command: cd litmus_inf && python3 -c "from portcheck import PATTERNS; print(len(PATTERNS))"

paper_claims.claim: 750/750 Z3 certificate coverage (459 UNSAT proofs + 291 SAT witnesses, zero timeouts) with extractable SMT-LIB2 proof certificates
paper_claims.evidence: litmus_inf/paper_results_v6/smtlib_certificates/certificate_index.json. 750 SMT-LIB2 files with unsat cores (avg 5.7 assertions) and SAT counterexample models.

paper_claims.claim: 228/228 herd7 internal consistency for CPU models (Wilson CI [98.3%, 100%])
paper_claims.evidence: litmus_inf/paper_results_v4/herd7_comparison.json. Validates against expected results from herd7 .cat specifications. .litmus files and validate_herd7_full.sh for independent verification.

paper_claims.claim: 108/108 GPU SMT internal consistency (no external oracle)
paper_claims.evidence: litmus_inf/paper_results_v4/smt_validation.json. 18 GPU patterns × 6 models. Same-author encodings. No comparison against GPU-litmus or PTX operational semantics.

paper_claims.claim: 55 UNSAT + 40 SAT machine-checked fence proofs
paper_claims.evidence: litmus_inf/paper_results_v4/smt_validation.json

paper_claims.claim: SMT-based discriminating litmus test synthesis (2-pattern minimal set {isa2, mp_addr})
paper_claims.evidence: litmus_inf/paper_results_v4/smt_validation.json. Independently rediscovers MP and LB patterns.

paper_claims.claim: 170/171 DSL-to-.cat correspondence (99.4%, Wilson CI [96.8%, 99.9%])
paper_claims.evidence: litmus_inf/paper_results_v5/dsl_cat_correspondence.json. x86-TSO: 57/57, AArch64: 57/57, RISC-V: 56/57. mp_fence_wr mismatch documented.

paper_claims.claim: 93.0% exact-match, 94.0% top-3 on 501 benchmark snippets
paper_claims.evidence: litmus_inf/paper_results_v6/expanded_benchmark.json (466/501 exact, 471/501 top-3). Wilson CI [90.4%, 94.9%]. Systematically sampled from 10 open-source projects.

paper_claims.claim: Per-source accuracy: kernel 96.2%, cpp_atomics 100%, gpu 100%, systems 92.3%, folly 87.8%
paper_claims.evidence: litmus_inf/paper_results_v6/expanded_benchmark.json. 501 snippets from Linux kernel, Folly, LLVM, Abseil, Boost.Atomic, DPDK, crossbeam, and 3 more.

paper_claims.claim: Severity classification: 228 data_race, 44 security, 70 benign (342 total)
paper_claims.evidence: litmus_inf/paper_results_v5/severity_classification.json. Rule-based taxonomy calibrated against CWE entries (CWE-362, CWE-667). Not validated against specific CVE instances.

paper_claims.claim: Compositional reasoning for multi-pattern programs (Theorem 6 + Proposition 7)
paper_claims.evidence: litmus_inf/paper_results_v6/compositional_analysis.json. 5 programs × 3 architectures = 15 analyses. 2 safe (disjoint), 13 unsafe (shared-variable flagged conservatively).

paper_claims.claim: pip-installable CLI (litmus-check) with JSON output for CI integration
paper_claims.evidence: litmus_inf/litmus_check.py, litmus_inf/setup.py. Install from source only, not published to PyPI.

paper_claims.claim: 6 critical + 5 warning GPU scope mismatch patterns
paper_claims.evidence: litmus_inf/paper_results_v4/gpu_scope_mismatches.json

paper_claims.claim: 642 meaningful differential tests + 3,000 determinism checks, all passing
paper_claims.evidence: litmus_inf/paper_results_v4/differential_testing.json

paper_claims.claim: 750 pairs in median 189ms, mean 217ms (bootstrap CI [160, 263] ms)
paper_claims.evidence: litmus_inf/paper_results_v4/timing.json

paper_claims.claim: Fence cost: ARM 50.9% ± 32.4%, RISC-V 66.5% ± 26.8% (analytical weights, not hardware)
paper_claims.evidence: litmus_inf/paper_results_v4/fence_optimization.json

paper_claims.claim: Conditional Soundness (Theorem 1) with RF×CO decomposition lemma
paper_claims.evidence: paper.tex. Paper proof. Conditional on permissiveness assumption. Empirically supported by 228/228 herd7.

paper_claims.claim: Fence Menu Minimality (Theorem 2) — trivially true by construction
paper_claims.evidence: paper.tex. Argmin by construction. NP-hardness of whole-program version acknowledged.

paper_claims.claim: Scope-Aware Fence Sufficiency (Theorem 3) — sufficient condition only
paper_claims.evidence: paper.tex. Sufficient condition. Converse failure acknowledged.

paper_claims.claim: Theorems 1-3 are paper proofs, not mechanized
paper_claims.evidence: Remark. 750/750 Z3 certificates as machine-checked evidence.

paper_claims.claim: Disjoint-variable composition (Theorem 6), shared-variable unsafe (Proposition 7)
paper_claims.evidence: paper.tex. ghb decomposition. Practically vacuous acknowledged.

paper_claims.claim: 7 false-negative cases: 4 SAFE, 3 NEUTRAL, 0 UNSAFE
paper_claims.evidence: litmus_inf/paper_results_v4/false_negative_analysis.json

paper_claims.claim: 25/25 hardware consistency (literature, not original experiments)
paper_claims.evidence: Literature-based, not original hardware experiments.

paper_claims.claim: mp_fence_wr is sole ARM→RISC-V discriminator
paper_claims.evidence: litmus_inf/paper_results_v4/portability_matrix.json
paper_claims.reproducible_command: cd litmus_inf && python3 portcheck.py --diff arm riscv

paper_claims.claim: Dartagnan comparison table (Table in Related Work)
paper_claims.evidence: paper.tex Table tab:comparison. Feature comparison only, no head-to-head performance benchmark.

paper_claims.claim: Rely-guarantee composition sketch (Definition 4) with disjoint-variable baseline (Theorem 6)
paper_claims.evidence: paper.tex. Sketch only. Disjoint-variable composition proven; rely-guarantee extension is future work with acknowledged quantifier-alternation difficulty.

honesty_notes.pattern_level_scope: 75 fixed patterns, not arbitrary programs. Cannot discover novel bugs. No coverage audit against real bug databases.
honesty_notes.compositionality: Disjoint-variable composition is practically vacuous for production code. Rely-guarantee sketch (Definition 4) outlines a path forward but requires quantifier alternation; left as future work.
honesty_notes.smt_internal_consistency: Both encodings by same authors. Internal consistency, not independent validation.
honesty_notes.gpu_validation: 108/108 GPU is internal consistency only. No external oracle, no GPU-litmus comparison, no PTX operational semantics validation.
honesty_notes.herd7_agreement: 228/228 validates against pre-computed expected outcomes from herd7 .cat specs. Internal consistency, not running herd7 directly.
honesty_notes.1_of_171_discrepancy: mp_fence_wr on RISC-V: DSL expressiveness gap, not model error.
honesty_notes.benchmark_systematically_sampled: 501 snippets systematically sampled from 10 open-source projects by tool authors. Not independently curated. Wilson CI [90.4%, 94.9%].
honesty_notes.false_negatives: 7 cases: 4 SAFE, 3 NEUTRAL, 0 UNSAFE. Wilson CI [0%, 35%] on unsafe-miss rate. Insufficient for safety-critical confidence.
honesty_notes.fence_costs: Analytical weight reductions, not measured hardware latencies.
honesty_notes.mechanization: Theorems 1-3 are paper proofs, not mechanized. 750/750 Z3 as machine-checked evidence.
honesty_notes.theorem2_triviality: Trivially true by argmin construction. Explicitly acknowledged.
honesty_notes.severity_taxonomy: Rule-based mapping from pattern name to category. Calibrated against CWE entries (CWE-362 for data races, CWE-667 for security vulnerabilities). Not validated against specific CVE instances or empirical exploit data.
honesty_notes.z3_trusted_computing_base: Z3 remains in TCB. SMT-LIB2 exports enable solver cross-checking (CVC5, Yices, Bitwuzla). SAT models verified by direct substitution. UNSAT proofs not independently checked via Alethe/LFSC. Risk mitigated by: decidable QF_LIA fragment, solver cross-checkability, and 228/228 herd7 agreement.
honesty_notes.dartagnan_comparison: Feature comparison table. No head-to-head performance benchmark.
honesty_notes.no_human_studies: No user study or deployment evaluation.
honesty_notes.no_pypi: pip install from source only, not published to PyPI.
honesty_notes.no_github_publishing: Not published as a public GitHub repository or package.
honesty_notes.conservative_models: May report false positives. 3/25 hardware points are conservative.

reproduction_instructions.compile_paper: cd litmus_inf && pdflatex paper.tex && pdflatex paper.tex
